use_codes.desc: TOPICAL TREATMENT OF ACNE VULGARIS IN PATIENTS 12 YEARS OR OLDER

indications.text:
ONEXTON™ (clindamycin phosphate and benzoyl peroxide) Gel, 1.2%/3.75% is indicated for the topical treatment of acne vulgaris in
patients 12 years of age and older.

®
ACANYA Gel is indicated for the topical treatment of acne vulgaris in patients 12 years or older.
ACANYA® Gel is indicated for the topical treatment of acne vulgaris in patients 12 years or older.
1.1 Important Limitations of Use 12 CLINICAL PHARMACOLOGY
ACANYA® Gel is indicated for the topical treatment of acne vulgaris in patients 12 years or older.
